info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API, ADOM version 7.0

System Template manages common system configurations that can be shared among various devices. All configurations under this template are device global objects. Once a template is assigned to a device, all configuration will be copied onto the device during the next install.

  • Prefix /pm/devprof/adom/ is used to access or modify the template and assignment.
  • Prefix /pm/config/adom/devprof/ is used to access objects managed by the template.

tags.name: /pm/config/log/syslogd/setting
tags.description: Global settings for remote syslog server.

tags.name: /pm/config/log/syslogd/setting/custom-field-name
tags.description: Custom field name for CEF format logging.

tags.name: /pm/config/system/central-management/server-list
tags.description: Additional severs that the FortiGate can use for updates (for AV, IPS, updates) and ratings (for web filter and antispam ratings) servers.

tags.name: /pm/config/system/email-server
tags.description: Configure the email server used by the FortiGate various things. For example, for sending email messages to users to support user authentication features.

tags.name: /pm/config/system/ntp/ntpserver
tags.description: Configure the FortiGate to connect to any available third-party NTP server.

common.filter.object.description: Filter the result according to a set of criteria.

common.range.object.description: Limit the number of output. For a range of [a, n], the output will contain n elements, starting from the ath matching result.

common.sort.object.description: Specify the sorting of the returned result.

params.cdb.get.obj.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the object will be returned.
scope member - Return a list of scope members along with other attributes.
chksum - Return the check-sum value instead of attributes.
datasrc - Return all objects that can be referenced by an attribute. Require attr parameter.

params.cdb.get.table.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the objects will be returned.
count - Return the number of matching entries instead of the actual entry data.
scope member - Return a list of scope members along with other attributes.
datasrc - Return all objects that can be referenced by an attribute. Require attr parameter.
get reserved - Also return reserved objects in the result.
syntax - Return the attribute syntax of a table or an object, instead of the actual entry data. All filter parameters will be ignored.

access-config.description: Enable/disable FortiAnalyzer access to configuration and data.

certificate.description: Certificate used to communicate with FortiAnalyzer.

certificate-verification.description: Enable/disable identity verification of FortiAnalyzer by use of certificate.

conn-timeout.description: FortiAnalyzer connection time-out in seconds (for status and log buffer).

enc-algorithm.description: Configure the level of SSL protection for secure communication with FortiAnalyzer.

interface.description: Support meta variable Specify outgoing interface to reach server.

interface-select-method.description: Specify how to select outgoing interface to reach server.

max-log-rate.description: FortiAnalyzer maximum log rate in MBps (0 = unlimited).

monitor-failure-retry-period.description: Time between FortiAnalyzer connection retries in seconds (for status and log buffer).

monitor-keepalive-period.description: Time between OFTP keepalives in seconds (for status and log buffer).

preshared-key.description: Preshared-key used for auto-authorization on FortiAnalyzer.

source-ip.description: Source IPv4 or IPv6 address used to communicate with FortiAnalyzer.

ssl-min-proto-version.description: Minimum supported protocol version for SSL/TLS connections (default is to follow system global setting).

upload-day.description: Day of week (month) to upload logs.

upload-interval.description: Frequency to upload log files to FortiAnalyzer.

upload-option.description: Enable/disable logging to hard disk and then uploading to FortiAnalyzer.

local-traffic.description: Enable/disable local in or out traffic logging.

filter-type.description: Include/exclude logs that match the filter.

certificate.description: Certificate used to communicate with Syslog server.

enc-algorithm.description: Enable/disable reliable syslogging with TLS encryption.

interface.description: Support meta variable Specify outgoing interface to reach server.

interface-select-method.description: Specify how to select outgoing interface to reach server.

max-log-rate.description: Syslog maximum log rate in MBps (0 = unlimited).

mode.description: Remote syslog logging over UDP/Reliable TCP.

ssl-min-proto-version.description: Minimum supported protocol version for SSL/TLS connections (default is to follow system global setting).

include-default-servers.description: Enable/disable inclusion of public FortiGuard servers in the override server list.

addr-type.description: Indicate whether the FortiGate communicates with the override server using an IPv4 address, an IPv6 address or a FQDN.

interface.description: Specify outgoing interface to reach server.

interface-select-method.description: Specify how to select outgoing interface to reach server.

password.description: SMTP server user password for authentication.

security.description: Connection security used by the email server.

server.description: SMTP server IP address or hostname.

ssl-min-proto-version.description: Minimum supported protocol version for SSL/TLS connections (default is to follow system global setting).

type.description: Use FortiGuard Message service or custom email server.

username.description: SMTP server user name for authentication.

admin-https-redirect.description: Enable/disable redirection of HTTP administration access to HTTPS.

admin-port.description: Administrative access port for HTTP. (1 - 65535, default = 80).

admin-scp.description: Enable/disable using SCP to download the system configuration. You can use SCP as an alternative method for backing up the configuration.

admin-sport.description: Administrative access port for HTTPS. (1 - 65535, default = 443).

admin-ssh-port.description: Administrative access port for SSH. (1 - 65535, default = 22).

admintimeout.description: Number of minutes before an idle administrator session times out (1 - 480 minutes (8 hours), default = 5). A shorter idle timeout is more secure.

gui-ipv6.description: Enable/disable IPv6 settings on the GUI.

gui-theme.description: Color scheme for the administration GUI.

ntpsync.description: Enable/disable setting the FortiGate system time by synchronizing with an NTP Server.

source-ip6.description: Source IPv6 address for communication to the NTP server.

type.description: Use the FortiGuard NTP server or any other available NTP Server.

ntpv3.description: Enable to use NTPv3 instead of NTPv4.

server.description: IP address or hostname of the NTP Server.

ha-direct.description: Enable/disable direct management of HA cluster members.

host-type.description: Control whether the SNMP manager sends SNMP queries, receives SNMP traps, or both. No traps will be sent when IP type is subnet.

ip.description: IPv4 address of the SNMP manager (host).

source-ip.description: Source IPv4 address for SNMP traps.

ha-direct.description: Enable/disable direct management of HA cluster members.

host-type.description: Control whether the SNMP manager sends SNMP queries, receives SNMP traps, or both.

source-ipv6.description: Source IPv6 address for SNMP traps.

ha-direct.description: Enable/disable direct management of HA cluster members.

notify-hosts.description: SNMP managers to send notifications (traps) to.

notify-hosts6.description: IPv6 SNMP managers to send notifications (traps) to.

queries.description: Enable/disable SNMP queries for this user.

security-level.description: Security level for message authentication and encryption.

trap-status.description: Enable/disable traps for this SNMP user.

attr.description: The name of the attribute to retrieve its datasource. Only used with datasrc option.

fields.description: Limit the output by returning only the attributes specified in the string array. If none specified, all attributes will be returned.

loadsub.description: Enable or disable the return of any sub-objects. If not specified, the default is to return all sub-objects.
